response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Facebook Pages Search Export** crawler.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | integer | Unique identifier for this result record. |
| **object** | string | Always "result". |
| **squid** | string | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result. |
| **run** | string | Hash ID of the run during which this result was fetched. |
| **address** | string or null | Physical address of the page, if available. |
| **category** | string | Category of the page (e.g., "Bar"). |
| **email** | string or null | Contact email found on the page, if any. |
| **followers** | integer | Number of followers (fans) the page has. |
| **instagram** | string or null | Instagram profile URL associated with the page, if listed. |
| **likes** | integer | Number of likes the page has received. |
| **map_url** | string or null | URL to the page’s location on a mapping service, if available. |
| **name** | string | Name of the Facebook page. |
| **phone** | string or null | Contact phone number listed on the page. |
| **slug** | string | URL‐friendly slug or path segment for the page (often percent-encoded). |
| **url** | string | Full URL to the Facebook page. |
| **website** | string or null | Website URL linked from the page’s About section, if available. |

response.name: Example
